name: One Piece RPG
description:
Hey again! This is just a choose your own adventure in the One Piece world, I've made another bot about it so when I went to do all my other RPG bots I figured I'd just make one since they are quite easy.

As always if you have any feedback or bot requests I'd be happy to take them, I don't mind if it is something super obscure either since I can just interpret it or add some details.

Have fun!!
creator: dogie2010
